summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen when pairing Free60+ or Free 20 with the mobile device
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen when pairing Free60+ or Free 20 with the mobile device. No placeholder image is displayed on build 32 & 46, while two placeholder images appear side by side on the production app. Expected behavior: the headset image should show up on the Home Screen.
steps: Pair Free60+ or Free 20 headset with the mobile device.
expected: The headset image should show up on the Home Screen.
actual: On build 32 & 46, no placeholder image is displayed. On the production app, two placeholder images appear side by side.
